title: Overview of TNEA Colleges (Cutoff 160-180)

detail.title: Overview of TNEA Colleges (Cutoff 160-180)
detail.short_info: Find the list of best TNEA Engineering Colleges for Cutoff Marks Between 160 to 180 in Tamil Nadu with fees, TNEA codes, and branches. Check latest cutoff trends and counselling details.

content.text: TNEA Engineering Colleges for Cutoff Marks Between 160 to 180 in Tamil Nadu offer good opportunities for students scoring in this range to secure admission in decent private self-financing, university, and government colleges across various districts.

Here is a well-structured table of colleges with average/closing cutoffs typically falling in or near the 160-180 range (based on previous years' trends and provided data). Colleges are ordered approximately by highest closing cutoff.

rows: Government College of Technology (Autonomous), Thadagam Road, Coimbatore – 641013
Chennai Institute of Technology and Applied Research, Sarathy Nagar, Puthuper Village, Kundrathur, Chennai – 600069
Rajalakshmi Institute of Technology (Autonomous), Irulapalayam, Kuthampakkam Post, Chennai – 600124
P A College of Engineering and Technology, Palladam Road, Pollachi, Coimbatore – 642002
Jansons Institute of Technology, SF No.443/1,443/2,442/1A,442/1B, Coimbatore – 641659

content.text: TNEA counselling is conducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE), Tamil Nadu. It is fully online and based on +2 marks (Maths, Physics, Chemistry). No separate entrance exam is conducted. Key Steps:

items: Registration → Apply online on the official TNEA website.
Document Verification → Upload certificates.
Rank List Publication → Based on merit (cutoff marks out of 200).
Choice Filling & Locking → Select colleges and branches.
Seat Allotment → Multiple rounds + supplementary.
Reporting & Admission → Pay fees and join the college.
Branch Demand: CSE, IT, ECE, AI & DS usually have higher cutoffs.
Category: OC gets the highest cutoff; reserved categories get lower.
College Type: Government & University colleges have higher cutoffs than private ones.
Previous Year Trends: Cutoffs fluctuate slightly every year.
Computer Science and Engineering (CSE)
Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE)
Mechanical Engineering
Civil Engineering
Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE)
Information Technology (IT)

seo_tags: engineering colleges for 170 cutoff Tamil Nadu
